todos.title: Danh sach cong viec
todos.subtitle: Tao, sap xep va hoan thanh cong viec hang ngay trong mot danh sach gon gang.
todos.empty_state: Chua co cong viec nao. Hay tao cong viec dau tien.
todos.error: Khong tai duoc danh sach cong viec. Vui long thu lai.
todos.save_error: Khong luu duoc cong viec nay. Hay kiem tra API server dang chay roi thu lai.
todos.delete_error: Khong xoa duoc cong viec nay. Hay kiem tra API server dang chay roi thu lai.
todos.toast_create_error: Khong tao duoc cong viec nay.
todos.toast_update_error: Khong cap nhat duoc cong viec nay.
todos.toast_toggle_error: Khong cap nhat duoc trang thai cong viec.
todos.toast_delete_error: Khong xoa duoc cong viec nay.
todos.description_placeholder: Thong tin bo sung neu co
todos.delete_confirm_description: Hanh dong nay khong the hoan tac.
